steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a meaningful contrast between the two sculptures. The most significant difference is subject matter: Marlow's Freedom Sculpture depicts human figures, while Whitaker's Diminish and Ascend depicts an architectural element.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In contrast to Marlow's *Freedom Sculpture*, Whitaker's *Diminish and Ascend* is displayed in a public place.: does not accurately identify a distinguishing difference between the two works. ✗
  • Choice B — Marlow's *Freedom Sculpture*, unlike Whitaker's *Diminish and Ascend*, depicts human subjects.: correctly identifies that Marlow's work includes human figures while Whitaker's does not. ✓
  • Choice C — *Freedom Sculpture* by Marlow and *Diminish and Ascend* by Whitaker are two examples of public art.: does not establish a contrast between the two. ✗
  • Choice D — Whitaker's sculpture *Diminish and Ascend*, which depicts a staircase that appears to ascend into the clouds, is on display in Christchurch, New Zealand.: describes only Whitaker's sculpture; it does not contrast it with Marlow's Freedom Sculpture. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
